swd.screen.config.title: Simple World Downloader Config
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.1: Set the name of the saved world.
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.2: If a world with this name already exists,
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.3: the new chunks overwrite parts of that world.
swd.tooltip.auto_download.1: Set whether worlds should be downloaded
swd.tooltip.include_entities.1: Set whether entities should be saved
swd.tooltip.include_player_data.1: Set whether player data should be saved
swd.tooltip.include_resource_packs.1: Set whether server resource packs should
swd.tooltip.include_resource_packs.2: be saved with the downloaded world.
